content.summary: 2005 年出生于卧龙、2011 年抵达上野动物园的雌性大熊猫，是香香、晓晓和蕾蕾的母亲，2024 年返回雅安碧峰峡基地。
Female giant panda born in Wolong in 2005, mother of Xiang Xiang, Xiao Xiao, and Lei Lei, and returned from Ueno to Bifengxia Base in 2024.

content.summary: 美香与添添之子，2015 年出生于史密森国家动物园，现居卧龙神树坪基地。
Son of Mei Xiang and Tian Tian, born at the Smithsonian in 2015 and currently recorded at Wolong Shenshuping Base.

content.summary: 力力与真真之子，2021 年出生于上野动物园，与蕾蕾为双胞胎，2026 年返回雅安基地。
Son of Ri Ri and Shin Shin, born at Ueno Zoo in 2021, twin of Lei Lei, and returned to Ya'an Base in 2026.

Former Smithsonian male and father of Tai Shan, Bao Bao, Bei Bei, and Xiao Qi Ji.
宝宝之子，是美香与添添的外孙，现居史密森国家动物园。
Son of Bao Bao and grandson of Mei Xiang and Tian Tian, currently living at the Smithsonian's National Zoo.

Former Zoo Atlanta female, mother of seven cubs; returned to Chengdu in 2024.
